questions_to_answer: What type of data are you ingesting from test.com?
What is the frequency of data ingestion (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly)?
Are there any specific authentication or API keys required to access the data?
What is the expected format of the data (e.g., JSON, CSV, XML)?
Do you have any specific transformations or processing requirements for the ingested data?
Where should the ingested data be stored or forwarded to after ingestion?
Are there any error handling or retry mechanisms you would like to implement?
